summary:
The agent correctly identifies that tocilizumab is not an anti-TNF antibody because it targets the interleukin-6 receptor rather than tumor necrosis factor alpha. It emphasizes this distinction based on direct mechanistic evidence from retrieval results.  

\boxed{B}
